prompt:
A handwritten mission log entry on an open notebook page, with pen strokes, a timestamp box, and a few small field symbols suggesting a recorded event in an ongoing journal. A pen and simple gear nearby add context without readable words.

Photorealistic 512×512 image with soft warm lighting, realistic paper fibers and ink texture, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the page centered and uncluttered.
